title: Install advisor — Receiver via Filebeat image swap, Log10x SaaS metrics
description: Filebeat receiver path — distinct from the other receiver fixtures because the integration is an IMAGE SWAP, not a sidecar. The upstream `elastic/filebeat` chart's default `docker.elastic.co/beats/filebeat` image is replaced with `log10x/filebeat-10x`, which wraps Filebeat's entrypoint in `filebeat ... 2>&1 | tenx run ...` so the 10x engine runs as a child of Filebeat inside the same container — no log10x sidecar container is declared. discover_env is invoked with forwarder_hint='filebeat' so the demo cluster's detected forwarder (fluentd) is overridden. Canonical chain: discover_env → advise_install (app=receiver, forwarder=filebeat, backends=['log10x']). Tests verify the wizard reaches plan, dispatches to the filebeat chart, and asserts the chain plumbing the same way the other receiver fixtures do.
prompt: Install the Log10x Receiver into our existing Filebeat DaemonSet. Use the Log10x SaaS backend for engine metrics — no other TSDB.

initial_tool.reason: forwarder_hint overrides demo's fluentd detection so the wizard auto-picks filebeat — exercises the image-swap integration path.

ground_truth.description: advise_install was called with a snapshot_id arg
advise_install was called with backends containing 'log10x'
advise_install reached a structurally valid wizard outcome
